security.csp: default-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:2000; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' http://127.0.0.1:2000; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' http://127.0.0.1:2000; img-src 'self' data: blob: http://127.0.0.1:2000; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:2000 ws://127.0.0.1:2000

bundle.shortDescription: A modern CMS built with Rust and React
bundle.longDescription: InkForge is a modern, fast, and secure content management system built with Rust and React. It features a powerful editor, theme system, and plugin architecture.
